text.fullText:
N
Goal
Build a new OCR library (class library DLL) targeting.NET 10 that replaces an existing.NET
Framework 4.8 OCRDLL.
The library mustOCR images and PDFs, run on Windows, and output a JSON document
that matches the provided JSON skeleton exactly.
Test Result
Thisistest#1 The result of this test
Should have this and that
Then here is another thing
Thisis test #2 We will se the results
For the second test
And we should follow the instructions
Final Test This should complete the test
